# Support

Thank you for using NexusBot.NET! Here are the ways you can get help with the project.

## ГѓВ°Г…ВёГўв‚¬Е“Гўв‚¬вЂњ Documentation

Before opening an issue, please check our documentation:
- **[Official Wiki](https://github.com/NexusRisen/NexusBot.NET/wiki)**: Comprehensive guides on setup and features.
- **[Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/NexusRisen/NexusBot.NET/wiki/Troubleshoot)**: Solutions to common issues and connection problems.

## ГѓВ°Г…ВёГ‚ВђГўв‚¬Вє Bug Reports & Feature Requests

If you encounter a bug or have a suggestion for improvement, please use the GitHub Issue tracker:
- **[Search Existing Issues](https://github.com/NexusRisen/NexusBot.NET/issues)**: Check if your issue has already been reported.
- **[Open a New Issue](https://github.com/NexusRisen/NexusBot.NET/issues/new)**: Provide as much detail as possible, including logs from the `/logs` folder and clear reproduction steps.

## ГѓВ°Г…ВёГўв‚¬ВєГ‚ВЎГѓВЇГ‚ВёГ‚ВЏ Security Vulnerabilities

If you discover a security vulnerability, please refer to our **[Security Policy](https://github.com/NexusRisen/NexusBot.NET/blob/main/SECURITY.md)** for instructions on how to report it privately.

## ГѓВўГ…ВЎГ‚В ГѓВЇГ‚ВёГ‚ВЏ Important Note

NexusBot.NET is a specialized fork of SysBot.NET. **Please do not contact the PKHeX Development Project for support regarding NexusBot.NET.** All support requests should be handled through this repository.
